name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE-CLEARANCE: Miglior Canned Cat - Tuna & Salmon, Pate 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your cat. Vitamin E with antioxidant action and a recipe rich in meat to help keep muscle mass toned.
description: Meat and animal derivatives 50%, fish and fish derivatives (Tuna 5%, Salmon5%), cereals, Minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 10%, Crude fat 6%, Crude fibers 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
